build.beforeDevCommand: pnpm exec node ./scripts/prepare-opencode-sidecar.mjs && pnpm exec vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 1420
build.beforeBuildCommand: pnpm exec node ./scripts/prepare-opencode-sidecar.mjs && pnpm exec vite build

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* https://accounts.google.com https://oauth2.googleapis.com https://www.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.googleusercontent.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self';
